title: Hunting Bugs on SecureKernel: Analysing case28 attack surface
excerpt: A deep dive into the Secure Kernels attack surface specifically the IumInvokeSecureService dispatcher and what happens when VTL 0 controlled data flows into SkmmAllocateIndependentPages without size bounds.

title: Hijacking Kernel Execution with ROP Chains in the Age of HVCI
excerpt: Walking through a hands-on kernel exploitation technique that turns an arbitrary read/write primitive into full kernel API calls via ROP chains
